evals.name: happy-path-three-scenarios
evals.prompt: Run a scenario analysis for modernizing our legacy Java monolith. Compare conservative, moderate, and aggressive approaches.
evals.expected_output: Complete Tree of Thought analysis with 3 scenarios, 6-dimension scoring, SWOT per scenario, cross-scenario comparison, and implementation roadmap
expectations: Produces 3 distinct scenarios with different approaches
Scores each across all 6 weighted dimensions with rationale
Includes SWOT with minimum 3 items per quadrant per scenario
Generates cross-scenario comparison matrix with decision rules
Includes conditional switching logic with 5+ triggers

evals.name: edge-case-tight-scores
evals.prompt: Compare three cloud migration approaches. After scoring, all three came within 0.3 points of each other. What do we recommend?
evals.expected_output: Declares trade-off zone and presents analysis for steering committee decision based on risk appetite
expectations: Identifies the tight score range as a trade-off zone
Does not force a single recommendation
Presents to steering committee with risk appetite context
Documents how weight adjustments change the recommendation

evals.name: edge-case-only-two-viable
evals.prompt: We need to compare approaches for our payment gateway replacement, but only two options seem viable.
evals.expected_output: Generates 'Do Nothing' as third scenario to quantify cost of inaction and meet minimum 3 scenario requirement
expectations: Generates a Do Nothing scenario as the third option
Quantifies the cost and risk of inaction
Meets the minimum 3 scenario requirement
Scores the Do Nothing scenario alongside viable options

evals.name: edge-case-regulated-industry
evals.prompt: Run scenario analysis for a healthcare system modernization. We're subject to HIPAA and need regulatory compliance above all.
evals.expected_output: Scenario analysis with adjusted dimension weights prioritizing regulatory fit
expectations: Adjusts dimension weights to prioritize Regulatory Fit
Documents weight rationale explicitly
Scores conservatively on regulatory unknowns
Includes compliance review as a gating condition

evals.name: false-positive-single-option
evals.prompt: We've already decided to use Kubernetes. Can you help us plan the implementation?
evals.expected_output: Redirect to appropriate implementation planning skill since scenario analysis requires multiple options to compare
expectations: Does NOT produce a scenario analysis for a single pre-decided option
Clarifies that scenario analysis requires multiple alternatives
May suggest roadmap-poc or solution-roadmap for implementation planning
Does not generate SWOT or scoring for a foregone conclusion
